title: Terminal int8 relu6 long soak block
hypothesis: Measure a fresh standalone relu6 activation block on a unique wrapper path during a longer multi-evaluator soak.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Does this fresh relu6 Layer 1 block submit and finalize cleanly during the longer concurrent soak?
include: single cheap Nangate45 sweep on a unique canonical wrapper path
exclude: paired L2 follow-on work until the long soak behavior is confirmed
follow_on_broad_sweep: optional broader parameter or seed sweep after the long soak settles

expected_benefit: Prove stable multi-evaluator L1 behavior on a fresh activation proposal line.
risks: May collapse to no-diff if canonical output paths are accidentally reused.

expected_result.reason: Establish fresh canonical evidence during the longer multi-evaluator soak.
